title: selaginella flacca
intro: Selaginella flacca, also known as the spiny resurrection fern or false rose of Jericho, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella flacca are attributed to its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory properties. Herbal preparations of Selaginella flacca are often made into teas, infusions, or capsules and are used to treat various conditions, including hypertension, diabetes, and respiratory issues.
